original: The lethal tendril weaves too fast for you to dodge or duck, and the weaponized tip lashes your arm!
Stinking rat-vole rodent piece of trash! You’re bleeding!
The damn rat struck too well, and as a result blood rushes from your wound - you’re bleeding!
I’ll make this quick!
You’re only making this harder!!
” he declares, rearing back for a powerful headbutt!
Try not to pass out!
You brought this on yourself!
” The rat boy charges at you, parries your deflective punch, and rears back for a powerful headbutt!

You redirect your momentum to your free hand and sock the rat boy in the side of his lunging head, your knuckles pinging loudly off his dizzied head! He twirls around twice like a drunken dancer, falling back
to the steadying arms of his companions
as you shake your [pc.arm] out. Better a bruised knuckle, you think!
The freckled pirate’s armored head collides with yours, a loud SMACK booming like thunder!
Stars explode in your eyes and you stumble back with a pained grunt, stunned. “Now’s our chance! Get [pc.himHer]” one rat triumphantly yells!\n\nYou are stunned!
<i>“Alright
, let’s ge-
!” the bold rat fist pumps, but you’re not out! Your concussed sight clears as you glower and groan warningly at the cocksure bandit. He scampers back
to the safety of numbers
. Shit, that’s the kind of bruise that someone will easily notice...
Unable to dodge back, you instead jump over the vicious swing. Before the rodent can try again, you kick his wrist and force him back in a dizzying twirl. He growls and half-cries in pain,
“That hurt, [pc.mister] CEO!” before shaking his arm and assuming an aggressive stance! That’s the point!
“Ow! You’ll pay for that!” before shaking his arm and assuming an aggressive stance! Yeah, sure!

You try to hop back, but the rat’s stun baton bounces off your "+({var0}.hasLegs()?"crus":"limb")+" with a nerve-numbing bang; smoke billows from the electrifying impact. You yelp and fall to the ground, head banging on the floor with starry-eyed results. The only thing keeping you conscious is the infuriating laughter...

original: Thanks to your special eyewear, all you need do is cover your [pc.ears], avoiding the worst of that pitiful attempt to subdue you!
You hurriedly shield your eyes and plug your [pc.ears]; the flashbangs blow, but you manage to avoid the worst of it!
The grenades go off and this plane of existence turns blank white. You are blind!
You sidestep those rapidly unspindling stingers just in time, watching them plink harmlessly off the wall. The rodenian reels the stingers back, huffing in frustration.
A loud click is all you hear before the spooling darts scream through the air in your direction, implanting in your [pc.arm] with a painful sting.
Before you can rip them out, an electrical bombardment assaults your shield!
A seizing electrical current is run through your body, bringing you to your knees
before you can rip the darts out and catch your breath.
and even to all fours. When the current stops, the darts are reeled back in by a smug rat.
<i>“Gotcha. [pc.Mister] CEO!
<i>“That’s a better look for you.
Now, get [pc.himHer]!
”\n\nYou are stunned!

“Hold still, hold still!” beckons the mouse "+{var0}.mf("boy","girl")+" clambering over "+{var1}.mf("his","her")+" fallen friend. ; shaking the exuberant mouse off your face is already proving to be difficult. The thought of getting to your valuables excites them beyond belief - they laugh triumphantly as their sticky fingers dig through your exposed inventory in search of wealth, mineral or digital, feeling you up in the ecstatic process.

Whilst one saucer-eared thief probes your vulnerable belongings, the other plants ".concat(this.mf("his","her")," crotch on your neck, blinding you under ").concat(this.mf("his","her")," round butt, your protests muffled beneath ").concat(this.mf("his","her")," plump thighs. The rapacious rat can’t help but grope you in between countering your fleeting moments of limp resistance, forcing you to groan into indistinct nether regions with a mix of lust and pain.")

Two mouse pirates pin you down painfully, one sitting atop your groin and the other above your chin. Your face-sitter’s damp and quivering butt drags over your face, led by roaming hands and followed by happy chitters. No matter how hard you thrash, it’s all limp resistance to them, and worse, they can’t help but steal gropes at your body. You writhe feebly under their combined bodyweight, getting hit back and turned on in equal measure.
An infuriating ‘ha-ha!’ escapes the cocksure thief’s mouth as they
pool your gems and some chits into one
throw your gems into a
throw your gem
and some chits
into a
throw some chits into a
sack! You buck savagely against the "+({var1}.hasSkinFlag({var0})?"fuzzy":"smooth")+" limbs wrestling with you, desperate to prevent these damn vermin from absconding with what is rightfully yours!

original: W-what!? Nothing? Then why didn’t you say anything!?”
“Looks like you’re in some trouble, [pc.mister] CEO!”
“Just give up, and we’ll make this easy on you!”
one says as your weapons are tossed in separate directions. If you manage to break free, you’re gonna have to get your gear back, as you’ve been disarmed!

They quickly resume their search. Lewd moans are coaxed from you as a pair of dainty, adept paws travel down your sides. Pretentious laughs ring in your [pc.ears], fueling the indignant fire burning inside that makes every bounce and pushback stronger.

one rat stomps on your wrist, your weapon slipping from your grasp. You cry out, though the wail is suppressed below your head-locking assailant’s backside. You feel your [pc.meleeWeapon] and [pc.rangedWeapon] pulled from your limp fingers.
“Looks like you’re in some trouble now, huh [pc.mister] CEO?”
“You should give up while you have the chance, you don’t have to get hurt!”
a female voice titters as your weapons are flung in two directions. If you manage to break free you’re gonna have to get your gear back, as you have been disarmed!

You push back desperately against the hands holding you down, still defiling the sanctity of your precious inventory and of your body too. Dainty, adept paws skip and jump across your [pc.skinFurScalesNoun], searching for plunder while pillaging your body. Strength gradually stokes the indignant fire inside, fueled by the pretentious laughter ringing in your [pc.ears].
